meta.description: Gotus, a free six-try word game.
document.title: Gotus – Word game
game.title: Current game
game.initialHint: Find the 6-letter word. The first letter is given.
game.help: Use the keyboard or the buttons below. Enter submits the word and Backspace removes a letter.
legend.title: Legend
about.title: About {product}
about.introAuto: Show the intro on the first visit
settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHelp: Changes the interface text and the game dictionary.
settings.timedResponsesHelp: A try is lost when the timer runs out.
settings.countInvalidHelp: A rejected word consumes a try without giving a clue.
error.noPlayableWords: No playable word in the dictionary.
result.failedAttempt: Out-of-dictionary word: try lost without clue.
result.summary: Result: {correct} correct, {present} present elsewhere and {absent} absent.
rules.title: Rules
rules.intro: Guess the six-letter word in six tries. The first letter is given.
rules.correctText: the letter is in the right position.
rules.presentText: the letter appears in another position.
rules.absentText: the letter is not in the word.
rules.confirmed: Correctly placed letters are repeated as guides on following tries, but only the first letter is mandatory.
report.context: Context: rejected as out of dictionary
report.modalWord: The word {word} is not in the current dictionary.
report.modalHelp: If you think it should be accepted, you can create a prefilled GitHub report.
